notes: landroverusa.com/<lineup>/<model> consumer site. Defender variants (90/110/130/Octa) share base /defender/ tree with sub-pages. Range Rover Sport SV is the high-performance variant of Range Rover Sport. Phase B 2026-05-14: Defender pages now canonicalize to /defender/<model>/index.html (was /defender/<model>.html) - updated. The entire Range Rover lineup migrated to the dedicated rangerover.com/en-us/ site; range-rover, range-rover-sport, range-rover-sport-sv, range-rover-velar, range-rover-evoque updated to their rangerover.com pages and verified OK. discovery-sport moved to /discovery/discovery-sport/index.html (was /discovery-sport/index.html) - updated. discovery unchanged. Session 8 (2026-05-15): added L-chassis-code slug_variants — L460 (Range Rover), L461 (Range Rover Sport + SV), L462 (Discovery), L550 (Discovery Sport), L551 (Evoque), L560 (Velar), L663 (all Defender variants). LRDX CDN uses /lNNN/ path segments and LNNN_ filename prefixes, neither of which match human-readable model slugs.
